cta.headline: Ready to Fix Your Garage Door?
cta.subheadline: Call us or book online for a free estimate. Same-day service available.

servicesPage.intro: From minor adjustments to full replacements, Speedy Garage Door Repair offers comprehensive services for residential and commercial clients in Dallas. We use only high-quality parts and back every job with a satisfaction guarantee.

services.title: Garage Door Spring Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert torsion and extension spring replacement for safe, smooth operation.
services.longDescription: Broken springs are the most common garage door issue and one of the most dangerous to fix. Our technicians safely replace torsion and extension springs with precision tools and high-quality springs rated for thousands of cycles. We ensure proper tension and balance so your door operates smoothly and quietly.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We assess the spring type, condition, and door weight to select the correct replacement.

process.title: Safe Removal
process.description: Using winding bars and safety protocols, we remove the old spring without risk.

process.title: Installation & Test
process.description: New spring is installed, tensioned, and tested for balance and smooth travel.

faqs.question: How long do garage door springs last?
faqs.answer: Typically 7-10 years depending on usage. We use high-cycle springs for longer life.

faqs.question: Can I replace a spring myself?
faqs.answer: No — spring replacement is extremely dangerous due to high tension. Always hire a professional.

services.title: Garage Door Opener Repair
services.shortDescription: Fix or replace faulty openers with modern, quiet, and secure models.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning opener can leave you stranded. We diagnose and repair all major brands including Chamberlain, LiftMaster, Genie, and Craftsman. If replacement is needed, we install the latest belt-drive and smart openers with Wi-Fi connectivity, battery backup, and rolling code security.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We test the opener, sensors, remote, and wall control to pinpoint the issue.

process.title: Repair or Replace
process.description: We fix what we can and recommend replacement only when necessary.

process.title: Setup & Test
process.description: We program remotes, set limits, and test safety reverse system.

faqs.question: My opener makes a humming noise but won't move. What's wrong?
faqs.answer: Often the motor is running but the drive gear is stripped. We can replace the gear assembly or the whole unit.

faqs.question: Do you install smart garage door openers?
faqs.answer: Yes! We install and set up Wi-Fi enabled openers so you can control your door from your phone.

services.title: Garage Door Panel Replacement
services.shortDescription: Replace damaged panels to restore curb appeal and insulation.
services.longDescription: Accidents happen — a car bump, hail, or kids playing can dent or break a panel. Instead of replacing the whole door, we match your existing door's style and color to replace only the damaged section. We carry common sizes and can order custom panels for older doors.

process.title: Panel Matching
process.description: We measure and source the exact panel to match your door's design and color.

process.title: Remove Old Panel
process.description: We disassemble the door sections carefully to remove the damaged panel.

process.title: Install New Panel
process.description: New panel is installed, aligned, and tested for smooth operation.

faqs.question: Can you match any garage door panel?
faqs.answer: We can match most standard styles and colors. For older or custom doors, we may need to order from the manufacturer.

faqs.question: Will the new panel look different from the old ones?
faqs.answer: We aim for a perfect match. Slight color variation may occur due to sun fading, but we minimize it.

services.title: Emergency Garage Door Service
services.shortDescription: 24/7 response for broken doors, stuck open, or security issues.
services.longDescription: A broken garage door can leave your home vulnerable or you stranded. Our emergency team is on call 24/7, including nights, weekends, and holidays. We respond quickly to secure your property and get your door working again. Common emergencies include broken springs, snapped cables, doors off track, and opener failures.

process.title: Emergency Call
process.description: Call our 24/7 line and we'll dispatch the nearest technician.

process.title: On-Site Assessment
process.description: We arrive with a fully stocked truck to handle most emergencies on the first visit.

process.title: Immediate Repair
process.description: We fix the issue or secure the door, ensuring your safety and peace of mind.

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for emergency service?
faqs.answer: No — our emergency rates are the same as regular service. We believe in fair pricing 24/7.

faqs.question: What if my door is stuck open and won't close?
faqs.answer: We can often repair the issue on the spot. If not, we'll secure the door and schedule a follow-up repair.

about.headline: Your Local Garage Door Experts
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners with fast, affordable, and reliable garage door service they can trust.
story: Speedy Garage Door Repair was founded in 1998 by a group of experienced technicians who saw a need for honest, prompt service in the Dallas area. What started as a small operation with one truck has grown into a trusted local business serving thousands of homeowners. We've built our reputation on transparency — no hidden fees, no unnecessary repairs, just quality work at a fair price.

Today, we continue that tradition with a team of certified technicians who live and work in the communities they serve. We invest in ongoing training and top-of-the-line equipment to ensure every job is done right the first time. Whether it's a minor adjustment or a full door replacement, we treat your home with the same care we would our own.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always do the right thing, even when no one is watching. That means honest assessments and fair pricing.

coreValues.title: Speed
coreValues.description: We respect your time. Our team arrives on schedule and works efficiently to minimize disruption.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use only premium parts and materials, and we stand behind our work with a solid warranty.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: Every repair is performed with safety as the top priority — for our customers and our team.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Estimate Today
contact.subheadline: Call or fill out the form below. We'll respond within 30 minutes.
